User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Working on Grass application.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was last updated.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a product offered by Working on Grass.

stock.description: Current inventory level for this product.

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) for the product.

layout.description: The page layout to use for this product.

valueProposition.description: A short, compelling statement about the product's value.

specifications.description: A list of technical specifications for the product.

features.description: A list of key features for a product, often used for book layouts.

howItWorks.description: A paragraph explaining how the product works.

fieldUse.description: Practical instructions or advice for using the product in the field.

authorityStatement.description: A statement to build trust and authority.

calibrationNote.description: Specific scientific or technical note regarding calibration or usage precision.

targetAudience.description: A description of who the product is intended for, often used for books.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a service offered by Working on Grass.

imageUrl.description: URL of an image representing the service.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents an order placed by a user.

orderDate.description: Date when the order was placed.

items.description: The items included in the order.

ContactFormEntry.title: ContactFormEntry
ContactFormEntry.description: Represents an entry from the contact form.

id.description: Unique identifier for the contact form entry.

name.description: Name of the person submitting the form.

email.description: Email address of the person submitting the form.

phone.description: Phone number of the person submitting the form.

location.description: Location or Farm Name of the person submitting the form.

serviceInterestedIn.description: The service the user is interested in.

submissionDate.description: Date and time when the form was submitted.

ConsultationRequest.title: ConsultationRequest
ConsultationRequest.description: Represents an inquiry for a consultation submitted through the website.

name.description: Name of the person requesting the consultation.

contactDetail.description: Email or phone number of the person.

location.description: Location or farm name provided by the user.

needs.description: Description of what the user needs help with.

service.description: The specific service the user is interested in, if any.

SiteImage.title: Site Image
SiteImage.description: Represents a managed image used across the website, like the hero or about page image.

description.description: A description of the image for alt text.

imageHint.description: A hint for AI image generation services.

MediaLibraryItem.title: Media Library Item
MediaLibraryItem.description: Represents an image in the media library.

name.description: The name or title of the image.

description.description: A description of the image for alt text.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp of when the image was uploaded.

definition.description: Stores user data, including email, display name, role, and timestamps. The 'role' field facilitates role-based access control (DBAC).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores product information, including name, description, price, stock, image URL, and category.

params.name: productId
params.description: The unique identifier for the product.

definition.description: Stores service information, including name, description, and image URL.

params.name: serviceId
params.description: The unique identifier for the service.

definition.description: Stores order information for each user, including order date, total amount, status, and embedded order items. Path-based ownership ensures secure access to user-specific orders.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for the order.

definition.description: Stores assigned images for specific spots on the website. The document ID (e.g., 'hero', 'about-frits') is the spot name and is used to reference the image in the code.

params.name: siteImageId
params.description: The unique slug for the image spot.

definition.description: A collection of all uploaded media assets. These can be assigned to various 'spots' on the site.

params.name: mediaId
params.description: The unique identifier for the media item.

definition.description: Stores contact form entries, including name, email, message, and submission date.

params.name: contactFormEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier for the contact form entry.

definition.description: Stores user inquiries for expert consultations, submitted through the services page modal.

params.name: consultationRequestId
params.description: The unique identifier for the consultation request.

firestore.reasoning: This Firestore data structure is designed to support the 'Working on Grass' application, focusing on secure user authentication, role-based access control, and efficient data management for products, services, orders, and gallery images. The structure prioritizes authorization independence and supports list operations (QAPs) by avoiding hierarchical authorization dependencies and using structural segregation. User roles are stored directly in the `users` collection, enabling easy management and modification of roles. To ensure Authorization Independence (CRITICAL), there are no `get()` calls required in the rules due to denormalization of user roles into the relevant collections if needed. This design facilitates simple, robust, and easily debuggable security rules.
